primary_constraint.name: Close → W1 Start
primary_constraint.description: Families who close are not starting sessions fast enough. 71 mentor-allocated families without a W1. This is the biggest revenue leak — they churn before they ever experience the product.
how_solving_now: Onboarding v2: mentor calls parent directly post-close (not Brodie text)
Structured DC handoff notes — 7 fields that travel with the family
Microowner welcome call with verbal payment confirmation
Portal centralised as parent hub (chat box + Meet the Team)
Brodie monitoring W1 delivery daily with escalation at 7 days
ideas_to_unlock: Speed-match algorithm: high-risk families (multiple objections + sceptical) get mentor call within hours, not days
Automated W1 booking in the close call itself — DC rep books the slot before hanging up
Mentor incentive: bonus for W1 completed within 72 hours of match
Parent portal 'countdown' — visual countdown to W1 that creates urgency and anticipation
AI-generated personalised welcome video from mentor to son before W1 (using handoff notes)

next_actions.action: Train DC reps on handoff note quality

functions.name: Sales (Lead → DC)
functions.how_unlocking: Onboarding new DC reps — Tom in training (Day 5), Riv assessment pending
functions.next_action: Update DC Portal with all calls in the call library. Continue training Tom.
future_experiments: External DC rep hiring ad — widen the funnel beyond warm network
Personality & Communication Report as lead magnet — AI-generated from questionnaire, creates high-qualified warm leads
Self-set call optimisation — currently 58.8% close rate vs 37% overall. How to get more self-sets?

functions.name: Activation (DC → W1)
functions.how_unlocking: Onboarding v2 — mentor-first model, structured handoff, speed-matching by risk level
functions.next_action: Build all 11 items on Onboarding Ops Manual v2 build checklist
future_experiments: W1 booking on the close call — DC rep locks the time slot before hanging up
Same-day mentor match for high-risk families (sceptical + price objection)
Parent portal activation gamification — progress bar, unlockables, first-session prep guide

functions.name: Retention (W1 → W12+)
functions.how_unlocking: Microowner model — 14-21 day organic check-ins, failed payment visibility per owner
functions.next_action: Assign existing families to microowners (Harry, Norri, Rye split)
future_experiments: AI progress reports from session logs — fortnightly parent update showing son's growth
Milestone unlockables — 30/60/90/180/360 day celebrations
Exit interviews set at sign-up as expected part of journey
Community events — quarterly parent meetups (virtual), builds social lock-in

functions.name: Marketing (Audience → Lead)
functions.how_unlocking: Hook tournaments on Meta — testing mentor ads (launched March 19), monitoring CPBC
functions.next_action: 48hr review of mentor ads. Compare mentor vs parent ad CPBC.
future_experiments: Personality & Communication Report lead magnet — questionnaire → AI report → warm lead
YouTube long-form: Harry's story + family testimonials → organic funnel
Referral program: give existing parents a reason to share (reward for both families)
School partnership pipeline — presentations to school counsellors

functions.name: Mentor Supply
functions.how_unlocking: SEEK ad + Meta mentor ads + TestGorilla screening → interview → trial session with Harry's brother
functions.next_action: Mentor hiring pipeline build (bookmarked for weekend)
future_experiments: University partnerships — campus ambassador program at Deakin, Melbourne, Monash
Mentor community call — weekly voluntary catch-up, builds belonging
Mentor progression pathway — session count milestones, pay increases, leadership roles
Automated onboarding: TestGorilla score → auto-invite → video interview → trial

functions.name: Product & Brand
functions.how_unlocking: Portal upgrades: chat box, Meet the Team, Your Journey tracker, failed payment filters
functions.next_action: Portal chat box spec + knowledge base content
future_experiments: Greys & Greens sibling brand — preserve family memories (recordings + keepsakes)
Parent community space — forum or group where B&G parents connect
Son-facing app — session prep, goals, mentor chat, progress tracking
Testimonial pipeline — automated ask at 60-day milestone via testimonial.to
